_comment: Health thresholds for the Machines-tab diagnostics verdict (issue #315).
Tune these to your hardware — they are data, not code, so no edit here needs a
code change or a restart of anything but the hub.
A rule fires 'warning' at its warn value and 'critical' at its critical value;
the run's overall level is the worst level any rule reached.

processes._per_app_ignore_comment: Aggregate buckets and inherently process-per-tab engines. These are collections of helper processes, not one app misbehaving, so a raw count says nothing about health — judging them made a healthy box report critical every run. Total process count still covers them.
